_note: docs/46 Phase 0 (2026-07-12): god-service accretion ratchet. Every apps/api/src/modules file over maxLoc=600 at introduction is grandfathered at its then-current LOC + constructor-param count; both may only go DOWN (extractions lower them; a file dropping under 600 leaves the list). Growing a listed file, adding a ctor param to one, or pushing a new file past 600 fails the build gate — land the change as a sub-service/registered provider per docs/46 §4 instead, or bump this baseline in the same PR with a justification appended here (use-client precedent). 2026-07-13 merge of origin/main: projects.service.ts re-baselined 1163→1173 LOC — main's PROJ-19 earned-schedule feature (#735) landed on main before this ratchet existed there, so the growth predates the guard and is not new accretion by this branch; docs/46 Phase 4 lists projects for a later extraction round. 2026-07-13 tenant soft-delete (migration 0386): billing.service.ts re-baselined 1095→1102 LOC — surfacing the new deleted/deleted_by fields in listTenants()/getTenantDetail() (already-owned tenant read paths) plus the includeDeleted filter; the mutations themselves landed in the new tenant-lifecycle.service.ts provider, not appended here. 2026-07-13 tenant purge follow-up: extracted factoryResetTenant's fixpoint-delete loop into the shared apps/api/src/modules/billing/tenant-wipe.ts helper (reused by TenantLifecycleService.purgeTenant) — billing.service.ts SHRANK 1102→1079 LOC, baseline lowered accordingly. 2026-07-13 same PR: re-baselined 1079→1081 LOC surfacing purged/purged_by in listTenants()/getTenantDetail() (audit_log-preserving purge redesign after the product decision to never erase the ITGC-AC-16 chain).
